title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 429.350 - Enforcement of mechanics' liens by associate circuit judge
text:
429.350.  Enforcement of mechanics' liens by associate circuit judge. — Associate circuit judges may exercise jurisdiction without special assignment in all actions brought to enforce mechanics' liens when the amount or balance claimed to be due does not exceed the monetary jurisdiction which associate circuit judges may exercise in ordinary civil actions without special assignment.
(RSMo 1939 § 2925, A.L. 1945 p. 1080, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2539; 1919 § 3087; 1909 § 7749 
Effective 1-02-79
